scripts.start:all: concurrently -n auth,event,gateway,leaderboard,notification,settings -c red,green,blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix ./auth-service start" "npm --prefix ./event-service start" "npm --prefix ./gateway start" "npm --prefix ./leaderboard-service start" "npm --prefix ./notification-service start" "npm --prefix ./settings-service start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n auth,event,gateway,leaderboard,notification,settings -c red,green,blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix ./auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix ./event-service run dev" "npm --prefix ./gateway run dev" "npm --prefix ./leaderboard-service run dev" "npm --prefix ./notification-service run dev" "npm --prefix ./settings-service run dev"
